docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance by either party at roll call. When parties appeared before Judge Myles on Nov-06-08, and he signed the stipulation and order to continue the case. THERE WERE TO BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THIS CASE PER THE STIP AND ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE MYLES.
10:40am
Final roll call. Still no response by either party. Case will be dismissed as abandoned.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Continued To Dec-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Judgment Entered
